name: Gloria Moss Old Fashioned Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a deep 9 inch pie plate with pastry. Flute edges and brush bottom of pastry with beaten egg. Refrigerate.
2. To prepare filling, combine sugar, salt, flour, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, allspice, and nutmeg in a bowl.
3. Stir in beaten eggs.
4. Combine pumpkin (2 cups) and milk in another bowl.
5. Add the pumpkin and milk mixture to the dry ingredients. Mix well.
6. Chill the filling for at least 1 hour.
7. Add brandy or rum to the filling; pour into pie shell.
8. Bake at 450 degrees F for 10 minutes. Lower heat setting to 400 degrees F and bake for an additional 30 minutes, until set.
